title: Collection of segfault fixes encountered in sv-tests

features.name: recursive module self-instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates itself directly or indirectly, creating a recursive hierarchy

features.name: recursive function call
features.description: Code should include a function that calls itself without a guaranteed base-case termination

features.name: recursive generate block nesting
features.description: Code should include a generate block whose condition or body leads to unbounded self-referential expansion
features.snippet:
genvar i;
generate
  for (i = 0; i < N; i = i + 1) begin
    if (i < M) begin : gen_block
      // recursive generate reference
    end
  end
endgenerate

features.name: recursive parameter-dependent type definition
features.description: Code should include a parameter or typedef whose resolution depends recursively on its own definition
